scripts.build: npm run sync:sigma && npm run bundle:sigma && npm run bundle:yara && npm run generate:samples && tsc && vite build
scripts.build:installer: npm run sync:sigma && npm run bundle:sigma && npm run generate:samples && tsc && vite build
scripts.preclude-tauri-build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); try { if (!fs.existsSync('.build-backup')) fs.mkdirSync('.build-backup'); fs.renameSync('public/yara-rules', '.build-backup/yara-rules'); console.log('Moved yara-rules'); } catch(e) { console.log('No yara-rules to move'); }"
scripts.postclude-tauri-build: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); try { if (!fs.existsSync('public')) fs.mkdirSync('public'); fs.renameSync('.build-backup/yara-rules', 'public/yara-rules'); console.log('Restored yara-rules'); } catch(e) { console.log('No backup to restore'); }"
scripts.tauri:build: npm run preclude-tauri-build && npm run tauri:build-internal && npm run postclude-tauri-build
scripts.refresh:rules: npm run sync:sigma && npm run sync:yara && npm run bundle:sigma && npm run bundle:yara && npm run generate:samples
